content.en:
Before you know it, an extradimensional era has passed.

this day.

The Nine Pastoral Realm Lord of the Jialan Chamber of Commerce informed Ye Tian that he had gotten his hands on it, and it was obviously the Great Realm Armor Technique that he had gotten it.

Ye Tian went over for the first time and saw the Nine Pastures Realm Lord.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, the Great Realm Armor Technique has already been obtained, but I have to warn you, don't try to cultivate. Without the Celestial Armor talent of the Celestial Armor Clan, the price of forcibly cultivating the Great Realm Armor Technique is heavy damage and fall. "

The Nine Pastoral Realm Lord said.

"I'm just researching and researching, maybe I can use the Great Realm Armor Technique, a super dimensional secret technique, to research and create the same type of super dimensional secret technique that is suitable for our cultivation!" Ye Tian said with a smile.

"Creation?" The Nine Husbandry Realm Lord shook his head and didn't say anything, there are so many extradimensional realms that he has tried to create, and even the fourth realm has tried to create, but the result is still unsuccessful, even the Great Realm Armor Technique is created by the Tianjia clan according to their own talents, plus many deduction treasures, and many strong people join forces, and it took endless years to create.

And in this case, there are still side effects of the Great Realm Armor Technique, and it is difficult for the Heavenly Armor Clan to cultivate to a very high level.

Ye Tian paid the fee, and the 31st realm master of Jiumu passed on the Great Realm Armor Technique to Ye Tian.

This kind of inheritance can only be passed on once, and it is also to prevent the inheritance from leaking and selling it everywhere.

Ye Tian accepted the inheritance on the spot, and then left the Jialan Chamber of Commerce directly.

......

"The Great Realm Armor Technique, the five-layer realm, is really mysterious. Moreover, the minimum requirement for cultivating the Great Realm Armor Technique turned out to be to comprehend the extradimensional rules, and it seems that even the Nine Mu Realm Masters don't know this requirement, otherwise they will definitely mention it. "

According to the introduction of the inheritance, as long as you comprehend the rules of the super dimension, you can cultivate the Great Realm Armor Technique, but the side effects are very large, even if you have the talent of the Heavenly Armor, you can't cultivate wildly, otherwise the physical body and the super dimensional Dao species will not be able to bear it at all.

Subsequently, he directly began to cultivate the Great Realm Armor Technique.

The first layer of the Great Realm Armor Technique is extremely mysterious, and it is very difficult to understand and practice thoroughly.

Even if it is the Tianjia clan, it is also a cultivation once, and it has to rest and recover for a long time, and they dare not cultivate all the time.

But Ye Tian was not afraid.

He began to cultivate frantically, not caring at all about the damage of the Great Realm Armor Technique to the physical body and the super-dimensional Dao species, only to see that during his cultivation process, dense lines appeared on his physical body, and as the cultivation progress improved, the lines were also improving.

These lines are the boundary armor patterns, once the first layer is practiced, the boundary armor patterns will form a complete body, so that they have the effect of resisting prying eyes and deductions, so that they can cover themselves.

After a while, Ye Tian's body began to collapse.

Thereupon.

He immediately changed to a replica body, and after changing the replica body, he had to start his cultivation from scratch.

However, if he retakes it for the second time, it will be very fast to improve to the first time.

Sure enough, it didn't take long for him to cultivate to the previous progress, and then continued to comprehend and improve the Great Realm Armor Technique.

Another time passed, and his body could not bear to collapse again.

In this way, Ye Tian spent a long time frantically cultivating the Great Realm Armor Technique.

Finally, after spending one-tenth of the time of the extradimensional era, his first layer of the Great Realm Armor Technique was completed.

Rumble!!!!

A trace of extradimensional rules turned into countless patterns of the Great Boundary Armor Technique, and evolved into a Boundary Armor pattern that was integrated into the body, causing a subtle change in the body.

But this change can't improve his strength, and can only be used to cover up other strong people's calculations about him, etc.

"From today onwards, the second realm's extradimensional realm will not be able to calculate my traces with the help of medium extradimensional dao soldiers like deduction. "

Ye Tian was very excited.

The most powerful of the Six Thousand Territory is the second realm, which means that this kind of strong person, unless he borrows a high-level super-dimensional Daoist soldier of the deduction class, can he hope to deduce his traces, but there are definitely not many things that can be deduced.

So, he wasn't too worried.

"Next, start cultivating the second layer of the Great Realm Armor Technique!"

According to the introduction of the inheritance, the difficulty of cultivating the second layer is at least ten times greater, and his super-dimensional rule realm is not high, if the super-dimensional rule realm is very high, it is easier to cultivate the second layer.

However, the realm of extra-dimensional rules is low, and it is also able to practice the second or even third layer of the Great Realm Armor Technique, but it is just more difficult.

"It will be very difficult for me to cultivate the Great Realm Armor Technique, but within two extradimensional eras, I should be able to practice it!"

So, he once again frantically cultivated the Great Realm Armor Technique.

In this way, time flies, and two extradimensional epochs have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's Great Realm Armor Technique began to transform, and he cultivated to the second layer of the realm.

Rumble!!!!

The aura on his body is even more subtle, and the Great Realm Armor Technique not only has the ability to resist other strong people estimating him, but it can also be used to hide the aura of cultivation, so that the enemy can't see through it.

For example, if he has now cultivated to the second realm, if he hides his cultivation, he can suppress his cultivation to the early stage of the first realm, so that the second realm can't see through him.

"The second layer of the Great Realm Armor Technique has been cultivated, and now even the third realm can't calculate my traces. "

At this level, the ruins of the Kun Bronze Realm Lord were of no use to him.

After all, that relic was only created by the master of the Kun Bronze Realm, and it only involved the third realm, so that the enemy could not calculate his traces, and it was actually not as effective as the second layer of the Great Realm Armor Technique.

When the Great 590 Realm Armor Technique had cultivated to this level, he finally breathed a sigh of relief.

Now, even if he offends the third realm, which is good at calculation, he doesn't have to worry about the other party finding him.

And the third realm powerhouse is already strong and rare, not to mention that he has to be good at deduction, it is even rarer.

And such a strong person can't calculate him, unless it's the fourth realm.

"Although the third realm can't calculate me, after all, I still offended the superdimensional elf clan, and the superdimensional elf clan definitely has a fourth realm. I still have to cultivate the Great Realm Armor Technique to the third layer realm, so that we can truly sit back and relax!"

For this reason, he continued to practice penance.

And the difficulty of the third layer is even more exaggerated, even if Ye Tian has the talent of Heavenly Armor and sacrifices many replicating bodies, if he wants to practice the third layer of the Great Realm Armor Technique, he will have at least twenty extradimensional epochs.

Then, one extradimensional epoch after another passed.

And Ye Tian's cultivation was still in the late stage of the first realm, and it was too difficult to advance to the peak of the first realm.

"My cultivation has long been promoted to the late stage of the first realm, but now if I want to be promoted to the peak from the late stage of the first realm, I need at least more than one super dimensional Chiyuan Dan. "

Ye Tian didn't have the channel to get the super-dimensional Chiyuan Pill at all now, if he relied on refining ordinary super-dimensional resources, it would take at least hundreds of extra-dimensional epochs to have any hope of breaking through.
